summary: Write voice capture now streams partial speech recognition into the editable note body while recording, then replaces it with the final transcript when the recording stops and the user remains responsible for saving the note.
recommended_next_reason: No adjacent pre-classified slice remains; stop for review after live Write capture support.

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for voice-write-live-transcription-capture
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff predated explicit proof, residual risk, repo cleanliness, and mirror status fields.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; product history and proof claims were not upgraded beyond the evidence.

residual_risks: No manual real-device microphone pass was run, so live partial timing and permission behavior still need a device sanity check.
